live_message: Vanessa Albright is on a call right now. The agent is qualifying her — agency owner, $1.2M revenue, looking for help scaling past founder bottleneck.
live_message_es: Vanessa Albright está en una llamada ahora mismo. El agente la está calificando — dueña de agencia, $1.2M en ingresos, busca ayuda para escalar más allá del cuello de botella de fundadora.

calls.name: Vanessa Albright
calls.summary: Currently on call — discovery call qualifier

transcript.text: Mason Cohen Consulting, how can I help?
I'm an agency owner. I keep hearing about Mason on a podcast and want to see if we'd be a fit.
Glad you reached out. Mason runs a thorough qualification before any engagement. May I ask your name and the agency?
Vanessa Albright. Albright Creative — we do branding for B2B SaaS.
Roughly what revenue range, Vanessa?
About one point two million this year. We're stuck — I'm the bottleneck on every project.
That's exactly the lane Mason works in. He has a free 45-minute discovery call to see if you'd be a fit for either his 1:1 or his small cohort. Thursday 11:00 AM or Friday 3:00 PM?

calls.summary_long: Vanessa Albright, founder of Albright Creative (B2B SaaS branding agency, ~$1.2M revenue). Self-identified founder bottleneck — Mason's specialty. Qualified above program minimum. Offering free discovery call Thu 11AM or Fri 3PM. Call in progress.

calls.name: Derek Sutton

transcript.text: Mason Cohen Consulting.
Hey, my buddy Mike at Stratega referred me. Said I should book a call with Mason.
Good — Mike's a graduate. May I have your name and your company?
Derek Sutton, Sutton Manufacturing. We make precision machine parts.
Got it, Derek. Roughly what stage are you at — revenue range, team size?
Five point five million, eighteen people.
Strong fit. Thursday 11:00 AM open for a 45-minute discovery — works for you?
Yes.
Booked. Mason will email you a short pre-call form Tuesday — three questions, takes five minutes. See you Thursday.

calls.summary_long: Derek Sutton, founder of Sutton Manufacturing (precision parts, $5.5M revenue, 18 staff). Warm referral from existing client (Mike at Stratega). Booked Thursday 11:00 AM discovery call (45m). Pre-call form auto-scheduled for Tuesday.

calls.name: Anonymous caller
calls.summary: Asked if you do 1:1 vs group (info sent via email)

calls.name: Anonymous caller

transcript.text: Mason Cohen Consulting, after-hours line.
Is this Mason directly?
No, I'm his scheduling assistant. Mason's offline tonight. Can I help get something on his calendar?
Sure. I want to talk about coaching. Don't want to share my name yet though — I'm still feeling this out.
Understandable. May I ask roughly what stage your business is at? Mason works with founders past one million in revenue.
We're at about two million.
Good fit. I can put you on the calendar with a placeholder name — you can give details when you talk to Mason. Tuesday 1:00 PM works?
Yeah.
Booked under "Prospect - Tuesday 1" with this phone number. We'll text a reminder Monday.

calls.summary_long: Anonymous prospect (~$2M revenue founder, name withheld). Above program revenue floor. Discretion accommodated — booked as 'Prospect - Tuesday 1' with phone number only. Tuesday 1:00 PM discovery call. SMS reminder Monday.
